nodes.label: Low-stock to shopping proposal keystone
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Kitchen/FABLED 2/2 - FABLED 2 — Gaps & Missing.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Detection and add paths already exist; the remaining wiring must be idempotent and present provenance-rich proposals rather than silently adding items.

nodes.label: Ingredient-to-inventory matcher
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Kitchen/FABLED 2/2 - FABLED 2 — Gaps & Missing.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Matching is the hard reusable layer behind confirmed cooking deductions, pantry-aware recipes, and later restock behavior.

nodes.label: Kitchen price-observation layer
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Kitchen/FABLED 2/2 - FABLED 2 — Gaps & Missing.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Manual staple prices are the fastest seed; normalized statement grocery lines can later upgrade estimates without blocking an initial release.

nodes.label: Inventory has no standalone route
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Kitchen/FABLED 2/2 - FABLED 2 — Gaps & Missing.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Inventory is mounted inside Catalogue; documenting that as intentional would turn an ambiguous gap into an explicit product decision.

nodes.label: Kitchen domain-wide test gap
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Kitchen/FABLED 2/2 - FABLED 2 — Gaps & Missing.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Kitchen is the only campaign domain with zero tests; threshold boundary and scale-ratio tests are sub-hour prerequisites for safe loop closure.
